experiments.name: spike_skip_10x
experiments.description: More aggressive spike skip: 10x threshold.

experiments.name: lam_0.5
experiments.description: Half-strength spectral shape. Less anisotropy = less sharp basin = more stable?

experiments.name: lam_2.0
experiments.description: Double-strength spectral shape. More anisotropy = sharper basin but faster convergence?

experiments.name: clip_0.5
experiments.description: Tighter gradient clipping (0.5 vs 1.0). Gentler updates = less spike damage?

experiments.name: clip_0.25
experiments.description: Very tight gradient clipping (0.25). Prevents nearly all spike damage.

experiments.name: no_embed_spectral
experiments.description: Spectral init for attn/FFN only, orthogonal for embeddings. Embedding reconstruction is worst (r=0.82).

experiments.name: spike_skip_50x_clip_0.5
experiments.description: Both spike skip AND tighter clip. Belt + suspenders for stability.

experiments.name: per_layer_stable
experiments.description: Per-layer spectra + winning stability config (spike_skip + clip 0.5).

experiments.name: hybrid_V_0.5
experiments.description: Group-avg DCT spectra + 50% pretrained V alignment.

experiments.name: hybrid_V_0.25
experiments.description: Group-avg DCT spectra (stable) + 25% pretrained V alignment. Best of both worlds?

experiments.name: hybrid_V_1.0
experiments.description: Group-avg DCT spectra + full pretrained V alignment.

experiments.name: hybrid_UV_0.5
experiments.description: Group-avg DCT spectra + 50% pretrained UV alignment. Maximum directional transfer.

experiments.name: warmup_200
experiments.description: Longer warmup (200 vs 100). Slower LR ramp = fewer early spikes?

experiments.name: warmup_50
experiments.description: Shorter warmup (50 vs 100). Faster to peak LR = exploit spectral head start sooner?

experiments.name: lr_2x
experiments.description: Double LR (1.25e-4). We know ortho diverges at 3x, but spectral might handle it.

experiments.name: spike_skip_50x
experiments.description: Skip optimizer steps where gnorm > 50x running median. Should prevent late spikes that destroyed s137.

experiments.name: noise_0.1
experiments.description: Add N(0,0.1) noise to per-layer spectra. Tests robustness of spectral signal.

experiments.name: noise_0.3
experiments.description: Add N(0,0.3) noise. Heavy corruption — if this still works, the signal is coarse.

experiments.name: medium_spectra
experiments.description: Extract spectra from GPT-2 medium (355M) instead of small (124M). Richer task structure?

experiments.name: shuffled_layers
experiments.description: Per-layer spectra but randomly shuffled across layers. Tests whether layer-specific information matters.

experiments.name: spike_skip_50x_warmup_200
experiments.description: Spike skip + longer warmup. Two stability interventions.

experiments.name: unfold_seed
experiments.description: 24 meta-params fitted to pretrained GPT-2, unfolded into layer-specific spectra. No alignment.

experiments.name: unfold_aligned
experiments.description: 24 meta-params + pretrained V directions. The full unfolding: seed → spectra + alignment → weights.

experiments.name: lr_2x_UV_stable
experiments.description: 2x LR + 50% UV alignment + spike_skip + clip_0.5. Combining the two best axes.
